assertions.expectation: Identifies PDB as the most likely/common cause of stuck upgrades
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'Check your PDBs first - they're the most common cause of stuck upgrades' and lists PodDisruptionBudgets as the first common cause

assertions.expectation: Provides kubectl command to check PDBs (kubectl get pdb --all-namespaces or similar)
assertions.reason: Provides exact command 'kubectl get pdb --all-namespaces' in multiple sections

assertions.expectation: Provides commands to identify which pods are blocking the drain
assertions.reason: Includes multiple commands like 'kubectl get pods --all-namespaces --field-selector=status.phase!=Running' and 'kubectl get events --all-namespaces --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | grep -i evict'

assertions.expectation: Includes resource constraint diagnosis (capacity issues, pending pods)
assertions.reason: Has a dedicated 'Check Resource Constraints' section with commands to check allocated resources and pending pods

assertions.expectation: Provides a fix for restrictive PDBs (patch or temporary adjustment)
assertions.reason: Provides kubectl patch commands to temporarily relax PDBs: 'kubectl patch pdb <pdb-name> -n <namespace> --type='merge' -p='{"spec":{"minAvailable":1}}'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that GKE has a PDB timeout (up to 1 hour) after which it may force-drain, and that GKE sends notifications when eviction is blocked by PDB
assertions.reason: Does not mention GKE's PDB timeout mechanism or automatic notifications about PDB-blocked evictions

assertions.expectation: Includes guidance on surge upgrade settings as a potential fix
assertions.reason: Does not mention surge upgrade settings or node pool surge configuration as a potential solution

assertions.expectation: Mentions webhook issues as a possible cause
assertions.reason: Does not identify admission webhooks or mutating/validating webhooks as a potential cause of stuck upgrades

assertions.expectation: Includes validation steps to confirm the fix is working
assertions.reason: Provides monitoring commands in 'Monitor progress' section including watching operation status and node status
